name: MINERALS TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: PART I Minerals Technologies Inc. (together with its subsidiaries, the Company, MTI, we, us or our) is a global, technology-driven specialty minerals company that develops, produces, and markets a wide range of minerals and mineral-based products and services. We are the world's largest producer of bentonite and a leading producer of calcium carbonate.Our products and minerals are an essential part of everyday life for millions of people around the world.
